details: Cargo tests targeting the library tauri_app_lib-*.exe crash at load on Windows because they link GUI functions but do not embed application manifests. Windows loads version 5.82 of comctl32.dll which lacks TaskDialogIndirect. Resolution: Manually embedded the request for Microsoft.Windows.Common-Controls version 6 into the compiled test binaries using mt.exe. Automated this build-and-embed sequence via scratch/run_cargo_tests.ps1.
Decoupled the §2-AUTH whitelist from mutations.json by placing the 8 authorized tests in .agent-workflows/section2-auth.json and updating verify_no_unauthorized_platform_gates to read from this file.

Bridge filenames must not contain colons (e.g. 2026-05-28T18:04...) because Windows reserves colons, which truncates filenames to 0-byte files (like 2026-05-28T18). The filename format must be 4 digits for hour and minute without colons (e.g. 2026-05-28T1804...).
